case_title: ABRAHAM LEON RANDICH ET AL VS. WHUENDY OLIVA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WERE ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARGO SEELY. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0) SERVED JUL-16-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVA, WHUENDY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY RANDICH, ABRAHAM LEON GOMEZ, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVA, WHUENDY ALVARADO, JUAN CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RANDICH, ABRAHAM LEON GOMEZ, MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OLIVA, WHUENDY ALVARADO, JUAN CARLOS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
